name: DataRetentionEnforcer

neutralConcepts: EXECUTION ORDER MANDATORY: 1=ILegalHoldService.check() → 2=IApprovalService.validate() → 3=F424.enforceRetention() → 4=execute purge and emit DataPurged
Legal hold active → emit ContentRetentionExtended, return immediately. Do NOT proceed.
Approval token missing/invalid/expired → reject without purging, return
DataPurged event MUST contain tombstoneRef ONLY — rawContent/content/payload/body/data PROHIBITED
F424 IDataGovernanceService PLATFORM-ONLY — governance policies not tenant-editable
F425 IWarehouseAuditService records EVERY purge attempt including rejected ones

ironRules.rule: EXECUTION ORDER MANDATORY AND INVIOLABLE: 1=ILegalHoldService.check() → 2=IApprovalService.validate() → 3=F424.enforceRetention() → 4=execute purge and emit DataPurged. Any reordering = BUILD_FAILURE.
If legal hold active → emit ContentRetentionExtended, return immediately. Do NOT proceed to approval, governance, or purge.
Approval token missing/invalid/expired → reject without purging, return. F425 must record the rejection.
DataPurged event MUST contain tombstoneRef. PROHIBITED fields: rawContent, content, payload, body, data. Including raw content in purge events violates data protection.
F424 IDataGovernanceService is PLATFORM-ONLY — governance policies are not tenant-editable. No bypass or tenant override permitted.
F425 IWarehouseAuditService MUST record every purge attempt including rejected ones. Unaudited purge attempts are a compliance violation.

keywords: data retention enforcer legal hold approval governance purge tombstoneRef platform-only warehouse audit compliance GDPR
